title: pulsatilla alpina subsp. cyrnea
intro: Pulsatilla alpina subsp. cyrnea, also known as the Arctic poppy or meadow poppy, is a subspecies of the Pulsatilla alpina plant, native to the Arctic tundra regions. The medicinal properties of Pulsatilla alpina subsp. cyrnea include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce menstrual cramps and other symptoms of PMS, and even help to treat certain skin conditions. Pulsatilla alpina subsp. cyrnea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being and treat various health issues.
